parameters.query:
SELECT
  d.id as id_dentista,
  d.nome as nome_dentista,
  d.especialidade,
  s.slot_inicio,
  s.slot_fim
FROM abo.dentistas d
CROSS JOIN LATERAL abo.obter_slots_disponiveis(d.id, $1::date) s
WHERE d.ativo = true
  AND ($2::bigint IS NULL OR d.id = $2::bigint)
  AND ($3::text IS NULL OR d.especialidade ILIKE '%' || $3::text || '%')
ORDER BY d.nome, s.slot_inicio
LIMIT 20;
